elements.description: A typed table listing launch sequences 430 through 449, with columns for Launch Seq, Date, Nickname, Op #, Facility, Vehicle Type, Program, Cum By Booster, Command, and Cum By Command. Three handwritten arrows point to the right margin at rows 447, 448, and 449. The page is numbered 23 at the bottom right.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content: a table with handwritten arrows pointing to rows 447, 448, and 449, with no contradictory claims about specific quoted text or object counts.
